title: Podman Desktop has a blue progress bar on Mac in the dock and app switcher
body: I just installed Podman 5.8.3 and Podman Desktop 1.28.2 and ablue progress bar remains in the dock and app switcher (cmd-tab) on my Mac (Sequoia 15.7.1). Here's how it looks in the dock: I'm not sure why it's there or how to get rid of it. Podman seems to be working fine.

comments.body: podman desktop is a different project, you need to report the issue there https://github.com/podman-desktop/podman-desktop/issues
